mapper.sql: ( dd.zs_order_detail_id = l.id OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM zs_tp_order_detail_delivery_rel r WHERE r.order_detail_id = l.id AND r.delivery_detail_id = CAST(dd.detail_id AS CHAR) ) )
mapper.update: UPDATE scm_delivery d INNER JOIN ( SELECT dd.delivery_id, MIN(l.order_id) AS zs_order_id, MIN(o.dh) AS order_no, MIN(o.hospital_id) AS hospital_id, MIN(o.supplier_id) AS supplier_id, MIN(o.ck) AS warehouse_name FROM scm_delivery_detail dd INNER JOIN zs_tp_order_detail l ON l.id = dd.zs_order_detail_id AND (l.del_flag IS NULL OR l.del_flag = '' OR l.del_flag = '0') INNER JOIN zs_tp_order o ON o.id = l.order_id AND o.del_flag = '0' WHERE dd.zs_order_detail_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(dd.zs_order_detail_id) != '' AND (dd.del_flag IS NULL OR dd.del_flag = '' OR dd.del_flag = '0') GROUP BY dd.delivery_id ) x ON x.delivery_id = d.delivery_id SET d.zs_order_id = x.zs_order_id, d.order_no = CASE WHEN d.order_no IS NULL OR TRIM(d.order_no) = '' THEN x.order_no ELSE d.order_no END, d.hospital_id = COALESCE(d.hospital_id, x.hospital_id), d.supplier_id = COALESCE(d.supplier_id, x.supplier_id), d.warehouse_name = CASE WHEN d.warehouse_name IS NULL OR TRIM(d.warehouse_name) = '' THEN x.warehouse_name ELSE d.warehouse_name END, d.ref_order_source = 'ZS', d.update_by = #{operator}, d.update_time = NOW() WHERE (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '' OR d.del_flag = '0') AND ( d.zs_order_id IS NULL OR TRIM(d.zs_order_id) = '' OR d.zs_order_id != x.zs_order_id OR d.supplier_id IS NULL OR d.hospital_id IS NULL )

UPDATE scm_delivery d INNER JOIN ( SELECT dd.delivery_id, MIN(od.order_id) AS order_id FROM scm_delivery_detail dd INNER JOIN scm_order_detail od ON od.detail_id = dd.order_detail_id WHERE dd.order_detail_id IS NOT NULL AND (dd.del_flag IS NULL OR dd.del_flag = '' OR dd.del_flag = '0') GROUP BY dd.delivery_id ) x ON x.delivery_id = d.delivery_id INNER JOIN scm_order o ON o.order_id = x.order_id SET d.order_id = x.order_id, d.order_no = CASE WHEN d.order_no IS NULL OR TRIM(d.order_no) = '' THEN o.order_no ELSE d.order_no END, d.hospital_id = COALESCE(d.hospital_id, o.hospital_id), d.supplier_id = COALESCE(d.supplier_id, o.supplier_id), d.warehouse_name = CASE WHEN d.warehouse_name IS NULL OR TRIM(d.warehouse_name) = '' THEN o.warehouse_name ELSE d.warehouse_name END, d.ref_order_source = 'SCM', d.src_order_supplier_id = CASE WHEN d.src_order_supplier_id IS NULL OR TRIM(d.src_order_supplier_id) = '' THEN CAST(o.supplier_id AS CHAR) ELSE d.src_order_supplier_id END, d.src_order_supplier_name = CASE WHEN d.src_order_supplier_name IS NULL OR TRIM(d.src_order_supplier_name) = '' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(o.order_supplier_name), ''), '') ELSE d.src_order_supplier_name END, d.src_order_warehouse_id = CASE WHEN d.src_order_warehouse_id IS NULL OR TRIM(d.src_order_warehouse_id) = '' AND o.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(o.warehouse_id AS CHAR) ELSE d.src_order_warehouse_id END, d.src_order_warehouse_name = CASE WHEN d.src_order_warehouse_name IS NULL OR TRIM(d.src_order_warehouse_name) = '' THEN COALESCE(o.warehouse_name, '') ELSE d.src_order_warehouse_name END, d.src_order_dept_id = CASE WHEN d.src_order_dept_id IS NULL OR TRIM(d.src_order_dept_id) = '' AND o.order_dept_id IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(o.order_dept_id AS CHAR) ELSE d.src_order_dept_id END, d.src_order_dept_name = CASE WHEN d.src_order_dept_name IS NULL OR TRIM(d.src_order_dept_name) = '' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(o.order_dept_name), ''), '') ELSE d.src_order_dept_name END, d.spd_supplier_id = CASE WHEN d.spd_supplier_id IS NULL OR TRIM(d.spd_supplier_id) = '' THEN COALESCE(o.spd_supplier_id, '') ELSE d.spd_supplier_id END, d.spd_tenant_id = CASE WHEN d.spd_tenant_id IS NULL OR TRIM(d.spd_tenant_id) = '' THEN COALESCE(o.tenant_id, '') ELSE d.spd_tenant_id END, d.order_date = COALESCE(d.order_date, o.order_date), d.update_by = #{operator}, d.update_time = NOW() WHERE (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '' OR d.del_flag = '0') AND (d.zs_order_id IS NULL OR TRIM(d.zs_order_id) = '') AND ( d.order_id IS NULL OR d.order_id != x.order_id OR d.supplier_id IS NULL OR d.hospital_id IS NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(od.detail_id AS CHAR) AS orderDetailId, CAST(o.order_id AS CHAR) AS orderId, o.order_no AS orderNo, CAST(d.delivery_id AS CHAR) AS deliveryId, d.delivery_no AS deliveryNo, CAST(dd.detail_id AS CHAR) AS deliveryDetailId, d.tenant_id AS tenantId, d.create_by AS createBy FROM scm_delivery_detail dd INNER JOIN scm_delivery d ON d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id AND (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '' OR d.del_flag = '0') INNER JOIN scm_order_detail od ON od.detail_id = dd.order_detail_id INNER JOIN scm_order o ON o.order_id = od.order_id WHERE dd.order_detail_id IS NOT NULL AND (dd.del_flag IS NULL OR dd.del_flag = '' OR dd.del_flag = '0') AND (d.zs_order_id IS NULL OR TRIM(d.zs_order_id) = '') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_order_detail_delivery_rel r WHERE r.delivery_detail_id = CAST(dd.detail_id AS CHAR) )

SELECT dd.zs_order_detail_id AS orderDetailId, l.order_id AS orderId, o.dh AS orderNo, CAST(d.delivery_id AS CHAR) AS deliveryId, d.delivery_no AS deliveryNo, CAST(dd.detail_id AS CHAR) AS deliveryDetailId, d.tenant_id AS tenantId, d.create_by AS createBy FROM scm_delivery_detail dd INNER JOIN scm_delivery d ON d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id AND (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '' OR d.del_flag = '0') INNER JOIN zs_tp_order_detail l ON l.id = dd.zs_order_detail_id AND (l.del_flag IS NULL OR l.del_flag = '' OR l.del_flag = '0') INNER JOIN zs_tp_order o ON o.id = l.order_id AND o.del_flag = '0' WHERE dd.zs_order_detail_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(dd.zs_order_detail_id) != '' AND (dd.del_flag IS NULL OR dd.del_flag = '' OR dd.del_flag = '0') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM zs_tp_order_detail_delivery_rel r WHERE r.delivery_detail_id = CAST(dd.detail_id AS CHAR) )
mapper.sql: z.del_flag = '0' AND (z.void_status IS NULL OR z.void_status = '' OR z.void_status = '0') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM zs_tp_order_detail l2 WHERE l2.order_id = z.id AND (l2.del_flag IS NULL OR l2.del_flag = '' OR l2.del_flag = '0') AND IFNULL(l2.sl, 0) > 0 ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM zs_tp_order_detail l WHERE l.order_id = z.id AND (l.del_flag IS NULL OR l.del_flag = '' OR l.del_flag = '0') AND IFNULL(l.sl, 0) > 0 AND ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(IFNULL(dd.delivery_quantity, 0)), 0) FROM scm_delivery_detail dd INNER JOIN scm_delivery d ON d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id AND (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '' OR d.del_flag = '0') WHERE (dd.del_flag IS NULL OR dd.del_flag = '' OR dd.del_flag = '0') AND ) < IFNULL(l.sl, 0) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_delivery_detail dd INNER JOIN scm_delivery d ON d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id AND (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '' OR d.del_flag = '0') INNER JOIN zs_tp_order_detail l ON l.order_id = z.id AND (l.del_flag IS NULL OR l.del_flag = '' OR l.del_flag = '0') WHERE (dd.del_flag IS NULL OR dd.del_flag = '' OR dd.del_flag = '0') AND )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM zs_tp_order z WHERE
SELECT CONCAT(z.dh, ' (', z.id, ')') FROM zs_tp_order z WHERE ORDER BY z.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
